title: Uschk Name. - Love's Torments
content:
Love's torments sought a place of rest,

    Where all might drear and lonely be;
    They found ere long my desert breast,

    And nestled in its vacancy.
meaning:
Johann Wolfgang von Goethe's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Uschk Name. - Love's Torments"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
